title: Percent Parlor
short_description: Run an ice-cream parlor where everything is X% off — miscalculate and a tiny inspector penguin stamps your forehead with AUDITED.
description: Welcome to the Percent Parlor, the ice-cream shop where EVERYTHING is on sale! Customers order percentages of scoops, sprinkles and sundae prices — work out 50%, 25%, 10% and trickier cuts fast, or the tiny inspector penguin waddles over and stamps your forehead with AUDITED. Grade bands ramp from easy halves and quarters, to 10% and 20% of bigger numbers, to full discount prices under real time pressure. A free online percentages game for kids in grades 4–6, with speed and streak bonuses feeding your score and GP.
controls: Mouse / tap the correct amount before the inspector penguin's timer runs out.
